model: v20clean 3-seed club ensemble + v21goal blend w=0.65 (lineup-aware)
confirmed_lineup_note: Both XIs 11/11 from ESPN summary (event 401896226). 14/22 player embeddings matched, ASYMMETRIC: Rijeka (home) 5/11, Derry City (away) 9/11.

bets.staking_method: Half-Kelly/8%-cap formula gave EUR14; downsized to roughly 1/3 formula size (EUR4) given Rijeka's own confirmed XI matched only 5/11 embeddings and the market's 87% implied favorite price is a large gap versus our 48.5% -- edge only partially trusted.

excluded_legs_note: Home win (Rijeka, -38.4pp edge, -44.2% EV) excluded as a clear no-bet. Away win (Derry City, +19.0pp edge, +284.6% EV) was also flagged as a candidate at the same downsized tier (recommended EUR5) but the user chose only the draw leg for this bet -- result recorded here is a LOSS on the draw leg specifically, not a verdict on the away leg (not placed).
data_note: 14/22 embeddings, asymmetric 5/11 (Rijeka) vs 9/11 (Derry City) -- downsized well below full formula on that basis.
provenance_note: Prediction generated pre-kickoff from confirmed XIs; bet placed at Unibet around the 18:45Z kickoff; this commit logged after kickoff and after the result was known (match had already been settled as a loss by the time of this log entry).
settlement_note: Draw leg lost -- settled at time of logging per user report.
